candidates.name: observed.source.record
candidates.reason: Foundational source envelope for dotfiles, unit facts, journal slices, and listener events.

candidates.name: transform.spec
candidates.reason: Missing middle layer between durable observations and admitted state.

candidates.name: live_state_event
candidates.reason: Canonical direct/enrich event contract for reducer and hot-cache updates.

candidates.name: policy.input
candidates.reason: Hot-path admission request must be compact, deterministic, and schema-bound.

candidates.name: policy.decision
candidates.reason: Gate result contract for allow/deny/require_approval/unknown with reasons and evidence.

candidates.name: dependency.graph
candidates.reason: Core relation model for impact and transition gating.

candidates.name: snapshot.meta
candidates.reason: Capture bounds, boot identity, freshness, and consistency semantics should be explicitly reusable.

candidates.name: state_space_snapshot
candidates.reason: Admitted projection contract once source, transform, and event shapes are pinned.

candidates.name: runtime.guardrail.profile
candidates.reason: Declarative execution hardening profile for runtime surfaces.

candidates.name: oscal.adapter.view
candidates.reason: Compliance and interoperability projection, not a primary runtime contract.
